items.transcript: If you can't get a handle on cat or dog hair at home, you need one of these. It's designed to remove hair from both the undercoat and the top coat, and it has this little button on it to push out the hair so that nothing gets clogged. When I have used this on my cat, I'd get rid of so much hair there would be enough to stuff a decorative pillow. This is the way that vets and groomers recommend taking care of your cats and dogs coats too.

We have ALL had days that make us feel crummy for one reason or another, and the to top it off, we come home to a bunch of stuff that needs cleaning, folding or our attention and it can feel like it never ends. I want to remind you that even if you did something *really* small today, go ahead and celebrate that. You unloaded your dishwasher this am? Amazing! You folded some clothes that were on your bed? Perfect. You emptied the trash? Yeah!!! I know these seem small, but on days that feel overwhelming these can feel like a lot of work to expend mental and physical energy on and celebrating that tiny win will make you feel better. And you know what? WHY NOT? Why not compliment yourself on something when your day felt hard?

👉 Follow for more cleaning advice, tips and motivation #cleanmyspace

items.caption:
Teaching kids to help around the house and getting them to be willingly participate is H A R D! I’ve done this with my 8 year old since she was very young and she’s a pretty helpful kid and doesn’t resist chores. I’ve lead with ‘I’m going to teach you life skills that will set you up for success’ instead of ‘you need to earn your keep around here’. Everyone parents differently, but I think this approach has worked so well for me and my daughter because she sees it as me imbuing her with a responsibility rather than foisting it upon her because she is somehow indebted to me. Subtle, but makes a big difference.  Anyway, this formula works every time and my daughter helps with kitchen work and laundry regularly. Save for when you need to teach your kid(s)! 👉Follow for more cleaning tips, tricks and hacks 
#cleanmyspace #cleaningexpert

Cleaning, chores, housework, domestic labor, jt all gets in the way of a relationship if you don’t know how to talk about it. And in my almost 2 decades of running a cleaning company and talking to thousands of clients, and in my 15 years of being on YouTube and talking to hundreds of thousands of you, AND my extensive years in therapy (lol fr), I’ve learned there is just one exact thing you need to say. And you come from a place of ME, not YOU when you say it:

“A clean house matters to me. And you matter to me. And I know I matter to you. When our house isn’t clean, and I don’t get any help, yes I’m frustrated on the surface but underneath it makes me feel like my needs don’t matter to you.”

THEN STOP TALKING. Hush. Let that sink in for your partner.

What happened here is that rather than blaming, shaming, or nagging, you just came from a place of “you”. It’s not about making them feel bad, it’s about telling them your needs are not being met in the partnership. And that hits much different.

In my experience, this is the most successful path forward when there’s struggles around cleaning or housekeeping or domestic work.

Would you try this? Or do you have any conversations that have worked on this topic? Weigh in!

Follow for more cleaning tips, advice and techniques!

#cleanmyspace

items.transcript: As a cleaning expert who's been doing this for almost two decades, you can only imagine the amount of gimmicky stuff that I have been sent over the years. But I'm going to tell you something, this window cleaning vacuum, this is the real deal. I'll tell you why. First of all, you can use any cleaning product that you want. So whether you're cleaning indoor windows, outdoor windows, mirrors, or even glass shower doors, this is versatile. And next, the second and really easy part is getting that streak-free shine. So rather than having to do a whole bunch of buffing and worrying about spots and marks and streaks, the vacuum squeegee handles all of that for you. So in one fell swoop, it vacuums up all the extra liquid, contains it, and leaves a streak-free shine. Your job is done, and you get beautiful results. Not a gimmick, 10 out of 10 recommend.

items.caption: Sometimes I find it really hard to get a job done. Especially a cleaning job. So doing AMCAP gives me a defined period of time that I just need to go all in on, and then I can relax and let it end. That simple. Thanks to all the trainers and gym bros out there who inspired me 🏋️‍♀️ and since I haven’t heard this being used before I’m officially coining it! #cleaning #cleaningtips #cleaninghacks #cleanmyspace #cleaningexpert
items.transcript: I stole this cleaning technique from gym bros and I can't believe how well it works. Okay, if you know anything about gyms, and even if you don't, there is this technique called AMRAP, which stands for as many reps as possible. And what this means is you give yourself an amount of time, say 60 seconds, and you are required to do as many reps of a particular exercise as possible. So I decided to take this technique and apply it to cleaning. Instead, we're doing AMCAP or as much cleaning as possible. And what that means is you pick a certain amount of time, throw that up on your timer, and just AMCAP. AMCAP the cap out of your room. AMCAP the cap out of your space. Just AMCAP. Do as much cleaning as possible in that short period of time. When I am struggling, I AMCAP. Let me know if you're going to give this a try and share this with someone who you know is struggling to get started with cleaning.

items.caption:
Are you on team dryer sheet or dryer balls? After almost 20 years of pro cleaning experience, I’m here to tell you there IS a superior choice. These are the pros and cons of each and the definitive WINNER (comment BLUE and I’ll DM you my top pick)! 

DRYER BALLS (Wool or plastic)

PROS:
-Buy them ONCE (I’ve had mine for years; only replaced the plastic ones when I lost them 😅)
-Cut static, grab pet hair, boost airflow and speed up dry time = lower energy bill
-Zero residue, zero scent, safe on almost everything
-Anything! Especially great for denim, towels, bedding and heavy loads. 
-The more the merrier, toss in 6 if you want!

CONS:
-Loud, they sounds like a basketball game in your dryer 
-Use plastic ones for synthetics (wool can shed onto athletic wear)

DRYER SHEETS

PROS: 
-Quiet (a real win if dryer balls drive you up the wall)
-Scented (if adding scent is important to you) 
-Creates ‘slip’ on fabrics making hair and pet hair less likely to stick
-Cuts static

CONS:
-Single-use, 1–2 per load, spending a lot of $
-Coat fabric to cut static (does NOT speed up drying)  -NOT for moisture-wicking fabrics like athletic wear or microfiber cloths, it’ll kill the absorbency
-Scented (if that’s an issue for you) 
-Some people say that it can leave residue on clothing, dryer drum and sensors

THE BOTTOM LINE:
Dryer balls are the better buy: it’s a one time purchase, speeds dry time, and is safe for almost every load. Dryer sheets are quieter and great for pet-hair pre-treatment, but pricey over time and not for every fabric. I’m team dryer balls and now I want to know about you - dryer balls or dryer sheets - what’s your preference? 

#laundry #laundrytips #cleaningtips #cleanmyspace cleaning

items.caption:
7 years as an LG Canada spokesperson, and this is the launch that had the whole room genuinely obsessed. 

We kept saying it to each other - people are so excited about dishwashers right now. And honestly? The new LG FlushFit™ dishwasher lineup really is that good.

The event also showcased LG’s broader kitchen lineup, including the stunning Zero Clearance™ Counter-Depth MAX® French 3-Door Refrigerator and Electric Range - performance and beauty designed to work together seamlessly in the kitchen.

But the star of the show: the LG FlushFit™ dishwasher lineup. Gorgeous, powerful, and full of details that actually got gasps:
✦ FlushFit™ design — nearly flush with cabinetry for a true built-in look
✦ TrueSteam® — breaks down stuck-on messes and helps reduce water spots
✦ Dynamic Heat Dry™ + AutoVent™ Dry — faster, more complete drying
✦ 1-Hour Wash & Dry cycle
✦ QuadWash® Pro — powerful cleaning from multiple angles
✦ Modular 3-tier racks — flexible for different loads and lifestyles
✦ 39 dB quiet operation — library-whisper quiet

And the projected status light, the flexible rack system, how silent it runs mid-cycle - nobody saw those coming. By the end of the event, everyone wanted one. And honestly, same.

@lg_canada #LGPartner #LifesGood #HomeAppliances #CleaningExpert #ProductLaunch

It happens to all of us. It doesn’t mean you need to feel ashamed, or bad or sad or beau yourself up about it. The mess doesn’t need to define you. Stop feeling bad and start taking action:
1️⃣ pick a hype song and play it for 5 minutes
2️⃣ pick ONE small area to focus on
3️⃣ start cleaning and do as much as you can 
4️⃣ STOP and celebrate.
5️⃣ if you feel good - keep going.

I PROMISE you, 5 minutes and a good song can change your life. Go for it. You got this ❤️!

👉 Follow for more cleaning tips, encouragement and advice #cleaning #cleaningexpert #cleaningmotivation #messy #cleaninghelp
